name: io.github.gucci10248/biomcp
title: BioMCP
description: Read-only biomedical MCP server connecting PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, ClinVar, gnomAD, OncoKB, Reactome, KEGG, UniProt, PharmGKB, CPIC, OpenFDA, Monarch Initiative, GWAS Catalog, and more. One command grammar for all biomedical entities — genes, variants, diseases, drugs, trials, articles, phenotypes, pathways, proteins, diagnostics, and adverse events.
